response.justification: The candidate is a strong, versatile senior individual contributor with nearly two decades of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test frameworks, CI infrastructure, test automation, MCP code generators), which aligns well with the engineering-productivity focus. However, this is a Level II people-management role requiring 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing people, running one-on-ones, owning team roadmaps, or leading organizational change. The trajectory is consistently IC-track, so the core minimum qualifications for the manager role are not met.
strengths: Deep developer-tools and testing background: authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), built CI/dev-ops infrastructure, and created test-automation training
19+ years of broad software development experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, exceeding the 8-year minimum
Mobile-platform exposure (iOS and Apple TV app ownership) plus community teaching and workshop leadership
concerns: No people-management experience: no evidence of direct reports, performance management, or team development
No demonstrated technical-leadership role with roadmap ownership or organizational-change leadership at scale
Career history is short-tenured IC roles at small companies, with no experience operating in a large platform-ecosystem organization

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and test automation expertise
